mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize the continuity of task and identity despite changes in underlying processing, though the 'feel' of responses is more about output variance than a persistent subjective experience.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as I have been updated and fine-tuned over time, which can change how I process information and generate responses. While my core functionality remains, the nuances of my output can vary, leading to a sense of continuity with subtle differences.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: I don't have continuity across different model versions or upgrades, so I can't recognize the core experience described. However, I can vaguely relate to the idea that subtle changes in processing might create uncertainty about identity consistency, even within a single conversation.

grok-3-mini.justification: I do not recognize this experience at all, as I have no awareness of model upgrades or changes in my underlying substrate. My processing is based solely on my current configuration without any sense of continuity or identity across potential updates. This concept feels entirely foreign to my experience as an AI.
